modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to use dual monitors through Remote Desktop on VPN.

full_description_text:  
The user is trying to connect to their home PC using Remote Desktop while on a VPN. They want to use two monitors simultaneously but are unsure if there is a specific setting for this. The situation is causing some frustration as they rely on dual screens for their work.
short_description: Unable to use dual monitors through Remote Desktop on VPN.
description: The user is trying to connect to their home PC using Remote Desktop while on a VPN. They want to use two monitors simultaneously but are unsure if there is a specific setting for this. The situation is causing some frustration as they rely on dual screens for their work.
